max_daily_transaction_count.description: Maximum number of ACH transactions per day

max_monthly_transaction_count.description: Maximum number of ACH transactions per month

max_daily_volume_amount.description: Maximum total ACH volume per day

max_monthly_volume_amount.description: Maximum total ACH volume per month

avg_monthly_volume_amount.description: Average total ACH volume per month

statement_descriptor.description: Descriptor appearing on customer bank statements (max 10 characters)

debit_payment_percentage.description: Expected percentage of debit payments (must total 100% with credit_payment_percentage)

credit_payment_percentage.description: Expected percentage of credit payments (must total 100% with debit_payment_percentage)

email_notification_thresholds.description: Receive email notifications for threshold alerts

email_notification_returns.description: Receive email notifications for ACH returns

email_notification_bo_exceptions.description: Receive email notifications for back office exceptions

special_instructions.description: Special instructions for ACH processing (max 2000 characters)
special_instructions.example: Process all transactions after 2 PM EST
